3299470.name: Soup N' Shots
3299470.description:
In Soup N' Shots, a first-person action game set in a post-apocalyptic world, you inherit your grandpa's farm—a place of hope in a desolate land. During the day, plant and grow veggies, cook soups and stews to keep your energy up, and listen to the radio to hear what's happening while working to the music. You can also explore the vast wasteland with your vehicle, always with your loyal dog, Tutuca, by your side. Find hidden secrets and solve the mysteries buried in a world ruined by its past.

But when night falls, everything changes. Dark, dangerous creatures rise from the ground, the music becomes tense, and you'll need to defend your farm with a powerful arsenal and a good bowl of revitalizing soup. Do you have what it takes to survive and uncover the truth behind this ruined world? Stay strong, because sunrise is your only hope.
3299470.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
